summary: E2E test of Sibug MVP (backend + Expo frontend). Backend: 24/24 pytest tests passed covering auth (register/login/me/regenerate-alias/bio), posts CRUD + moods + delete ownership, feed tabs (latest/trending/nearby/pulse), reactions (toggle, notification, helpful_score bump), flat comments (create + count), pulse voting (change vote), notifications (unread-count + read-all), chat (start + send + participants + self-chat rejection), blocks (feed exclusion + DM 403 + list + unblock), report, and WebSocket handshake (valid connects, invalid closes). Frontend: welcome → signup → home works, feed loads 17+ seeded posts, all 4 feed tabs switch, Create post (mood + content + submit → detail) works, Post detail shows reactions + comments UI, Profile loads with alias, bio edit + save works, regenerate alias confirm works, Settings screen loads, Notifications/Messages tabs load and display real data. No deprecated Expo packages (expo-av / expo-barcode-scanner / expo-background-fetch) found. SafeAreaView imported from react-native-safe-area-context (correct). Minor: only two RN-web console warnings (shadow* style props + props.pointerEvents deprecation) from underlying libs — informational only.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated (use boxShadow) and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated' (use style.pointerEvents). Cosmetic; not from app code but from library-emitted styles. No functional impact.

action_items: (Optional) Suppress or migrate off deprecated RN-web style props (shadow*/pointerEvents) if a warning-free console is desired.
(Optional) Consider hardening JWT_SECRET (currently '...change_me_in_prod_2026') before production deploy.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 878 lines — single-file design is acceptable for MVP but should be split (auth/posts/chat/ws routers) if growth continues.
POST /api/dev/seed is exposed without auth guard on a public preview URL; fine for demo but should be gated (env flag or admin token) before production.
'audience=nearby' is stored but there is no geolocation gating — feed only filters by string. If real 'Nearby' semantics are expected later, add lat/lng + geo query.
WebSocket /api/ws simply blocks on ws.receive_text(); no ping/pong keepalive — acceptable for MVP behind ingress but consider heartbeat for long-lived connections.
helpful_score is bumped on every helpful reaction but is NOT decremented when the reaction toggles off (react_post toggle-off path). Minor economy issue — verify with product owner.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of executed flows (welcome, signup, home feed, tab switching, create post → detail, profile, bio edit, regen alias, settings, notifications, messages)

seed_data_creation: POST /api/dev/seed invoked — 3 demo users + 7 sample posts + 1 pulse. TEST_-prefixed users/posts/comments created by pytest for isolation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints and every user-facing frontend flow are functional as of iteration_1. Session persists via authContext; navigation is via Expo Router with (tabs) group — deep URLs /home, /create, /notifications, /messages, /profile all resolve correctly when authenticated. Bottom tab bar labels: Home, Create, Alerts, Messages, Profile (note: 'Alerts' is the notification tab label). testIDs are well-populated across screens. Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_sibug_api.py for regression.
